title: Document 100-event-per-frame drain cap in App::update
description: main.rs App::update() drains at most 100 events per frame (while count < 100). The section comment labels this as a cap but does not explain: (1) why 100 specifically (frame budget? measured at 60fps?), (2) what happens when more than 100 events are queued — the next repaint will drain the next 100, but does egui schedule an immediate repaint when the channel is non-empty? Without a note, a contributor may raise this as a potential starvation issue without understanding whether it was already considered. Add a comment explaining the cap's purpose and the re-paint guarantee (or lack thereof) that makes it safe.
